content.answer:
Hi all,

Attached kindly find the captioned deck for your reference. Will discuss
more in detail tomorrow.

Thanks,
Ashley

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 5

   - CB met topline numbers (ADO/ADG) but fell short of SLS P&L?

Slide 22

   - What is the ABS of Local SCS right now?

USD 2.64 feels too low. What
   is the item/order ratio?

Slide 24

   - Probably need to watch out for our P&L here, seems like we overspent
   by quite a bit
   - If I look at TB sellers, their ABS is about USD 11 in PH?

(Slide 61).
   Our ABS probably need to increase here, it is probably still too low



Slide 28

   - What is PH exporting out?

The ABS looks high



Slide 44

   - How is the blackstock situation right now?

Are we being too
   conservative now?

Slide 45

   - Actual is so much lower than forecast?

Which means we have idle
   resources?
- For PHE, the manual schedule qty % is still so high?

Slide 46

   - We should be tracking ATP%, need to put some definitions in play, and
   probably measure across all markets too. This should be a KAM KPI at some
   point



Slide 52

   - Is this via SLS?
- Are these in other markets as well?

If not, how shall we bring them
   over?

content.answer:
-0.4mil: from Topline missing target: despite overall topline runrate
   okay, MP (3P SLS) runrate at ~93% runrate, this is due to higher runrate
   for Choice and 3PF which has lower/no SLS profit

-0.2mil: from channel mix diff vs target: XDD channel lower than target
   by ~10%, which XDD channel has a higher profit margin than standard channel
   (~0.5usd/pc vs 0.4usd/pc PPO difference)

-0.3mil: from SIP SLS ASF rate reduction (email name: [For your info]
   P&L impact in Feb due to SIP SLS ASF adjustment _PH Lane), suggest to SIP
   to obtain approval from CBBI and PHCB beforehand in future on decisions
   impacting local CB P&L



Slide 22

   - What is the ABS of Local SCS right now? USD 2.64 feels too low. What
   is the item/order ratio?


   -

   Local SCS ABS is $2.72, IPO is 1.64. CN SCS ABS is $2.69, with an IPO of
   1.40. CN SCS focuses on short tail, hot selling items, bringing the ABS
   lower than CB Non-mall at $5.6.
   -

   The low ABS is primarily determined by the low MBS of Platform FSV,
   which are $0, $0.85, and $1.71 for ~90% of the platform FSVs
   -

   CN SCS UE is healthy and on track. The overall PC3% is around 10-15% in
   Feb, which is well above our break-even target of 9-10%.

Slide 24

   - Probably need to watch out for our P&L here, seems like we overspent
   by quite a bit
   - If I look at TB sellers, their ABS is about USD 11 in PH? (Slide 61).
   Our ABS probably need to increase here, it is probably still too low

For Lovito Feb PC3 miss target, mainly due to increasing CPAS Ads KOL
investment, to catch up with S&R imp lost (due to guidelines and
initiatives updates, incl. PID criteria update, cheapest and replacement
experiment, etc).

For ABS

   -

      Lovito has been working on the high ABS assortment series Refine (ASP
      $6+) with MTD ADO 3k; Overall ABS has been increasing for the past 3
      months: Feb MTD $6.25 vs Jan $6.24 and Dec $6.19
      -

      TB WA ABS is $8 ($11 for all categories incl. Lifestyle Shoes top
      brands Anta, XTEP, 361, Lining and Fashion Watches - Daniel Wellington)



Slide 28

   - What is PH exporting out? The ABS looks high

PH exporting out mainly in Fashion, Home & Living and Beauty. High ABS due
to pricing markup and driven up by selling higher ABS price range products
such as sports & outdoor equip

Hi all,

Pls find the action items from today's meeting.

No.

Topic

Action Items / Aligned Direction

PIC

ETA

1

Temu

Co-work with DC crawler team to increase Temu front-end crawling frequency
and to track Temu PH price competitiveness more frequently

Derek Cheng

Pending on DC's feedback, trying to push ASAP

2

SCS

For Local SCS, improve ABS in the long term to 5-6$. Short term, we expect
lower ABS for topline and seller management considerations.

For CB SCS, working on ABS improvement plan and will update if ready

Larry Lin / Sruti Kattoor

Aligned Direction

3

Lovito

Revisit refine series assortment and sales channel investment plan and come
up with updated plan

Vega Song

4 Mar

4

Lovito

   -

   Aligned to switch paid ads to CPAS based on 110% ADG achievement
   -

   ADG target has to be aligned with PH team and fixed for the whole year,
   will align with FPA

Vega Song

4 Mar

5

SIP

Approved for PH to participate in regional rollout of Global Seller Center
x Direct Selling

Cuiwei Sun

7 Mar (to update on rollout timeline)

6

SIP

Explore TW-PH route impact potential and update in next PHCB meeting

Cuiwei Sun / Rey Valero

21 March

7

OOS

Aligned to use ATP instead of OOS across markets

Jason Yu

7 Mar (to consolidate and align definition)

8

CNLS

Account transfer

   1.

   Share new shoplist for review
   2.

   For sellers with negative feedback on CN RMs, to investigate and align
   with both sides on next steps

Ray Wang

   1.

   Completed
   2.

   7 March


Thanks,
Ashley
